description: Use this API to return real area data items. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rval = aredat(iar, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the area quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Desired net interchange leaving area in MW.
Same as ‘PDES’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Same as ‘PTOL’ in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: Area number <= 0 or > largest allowable area number; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
